themes.verdant: Parts 1-3 — living forest, lush and natural. Sheet 1: naturalistic. Sheet 2: magical/fantastical.

placement_rules.open: Needs clear space — not adjacent to other large sprites
placement_rules.path-adjacent: Placed within 1 cell of path edge

animation_approach.canvas-math: Driven by bgTime — glow-pulse, flicker, rotate, scale-breathe, float. No extra assets.
animation_approach.sprite-frames: Frame strip sheet required. Reserved for shape-changing animations (blink, flame, water ripple).

animation_types.blink: SPRITE FRAMES REQUIRED — not yet implemented
